text: Verily, with every hardship comes ease. (94:5)
loveLine: Even in the darkest seasons, your soul is a light I recognize.
reflection: Confused? Trust the timing of the Almighty.

text: And He found you lost and guided you. (93:7)
loveLine: I was a wanderer until I saw the reflection of peace in your eyes.
reflection: Sad? He knows exactly where you are.

text: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear. (2:286)
loveLine: You are stronger than the storms you've weathered.
reflection: Struggling? You were built for this journey.

text: So remember Me; I will remember you. (2:152)
loveLine: To be known by you is the greatest gift of this life.
reflection: Lonely? You are never truly alone.

text: He is with you wherever you are. (57:4)
loveLine: Distance is just a test to see how far love can travel.
reflection: Happy? Share your joy with the One who gave it.

text: And We created you in pairs. (78:8)
loveLine: You are the missing verse in the poem of my life.
reflection: Grateful? This connection is a sign of His Mercy.

text: My mercy encompasses all things. (7:156)
loveLine: In your quiet strength, I see the most beautiful form of grace.
reflection: Feeling imperfect? You are held in Infinite Mercy.

text: Call upon Me; I will respond to you. (40:60)
loveLine: Every time I pray for myself, I find your name on my lips first.
reflection: Doubtful? The door is always open.

text: Is not Allah sufficient for His servant? (39:36)
loveLine: You are enough, exactly as you are, in every single moment.
reflection: Insecure? You are already complete.

text: And seek help through patience and prayer. (2:45)
loveLine: I admire the way you study the world with such fierce focus.
reflection: Tired? Rest your heart in the Prostration.

text: Indeed, my Lord is near and responsive. (11:61)
loveLine: You feel like home, even when we are miles apart.
reflection: Anxious? He is closer than your jugular vein.

text: Which of the favors of your Lord will you deny? (55:13)
loveLine: Your existence is the favorite chapter of my story.
reflection: Look around; beauty is everywhere if you seek it.

text: And keep yourself patient [by being] with those who call upon their Lord. (18:28)
loveLine: I promise to be the one who always points you back to Him.
reflection: Friendship is the highest form of love.

text: The stars are guided by His command. (16:12)
loveLine: Your dreams are valid, and I will help you reach every single one.
reflection: Lost? Look up; the same hand guides the stars.

text: Our Lord, let not our hearts deviate after You have guided us. (3:8)
loveLine: I pray we grow closer to each other as we grow closer to Him.
reflection: Growth is a lifelong prayer.

text: He knows what is in every heart. (67:13)
loveLine: You don't have to explain your silence to me; I hear you.
reflection: Misunderstood? He knows the words you cannot say.

text: Peace, a word from a Merciful Lord. (36:58)
loveLine: May your mind find the stillness it deserves after a long day.
reflection: The ultimate goal is a heart at peace.

text: And Allah is the best of providers. (62:11)
loveLine: I work hard today so I can build the world you deserve tomorrow.
reflection: Trust the provision; focus on the effort.

text: And ever is He, to the believers, Merciful. (33:43)
loveLine: Your kindness is a legacy that will outlive us both.
reflection: Be gentle with yourself; He is gentle with you.

text: Indeed, Allah loves those who rely [upon Him]. (3:159)
loveLine: Lean on me when you're tired, but always lean on Him for strength.
reflection: Reliance is the end of worry.

text: The life of this world is but amusement and play. (29:64)
loveLine: Let's build something that lasts far beyond these temporary shores.
reflection: Don't take the small stresses too seriously.

text: And be patient, for indeed, Allah does not allow to be lost the reward of those who do good. (11:115)
loveLine: I see every small effort you make. It never goes unnoticed.
reflection: Every good deed is a seed planted.

text: So truly where there is hardship, there is also ease. (94:6)
loveLine: We will walk through the fire together, and come out like gold.
reflection: The ease is coming. Just hold on.

text: Allah is the Light of the heavens and the earth. (24:35)
loveLine: Your soul has a glow that no shadow can touch.
reflection: Walk toward the light; the shadows will fall behind you.

text: And warn, for verily, the warning profits the believers. (51:55)
loveLine: Thank you for being the person who keeps me grounded.
reflection: Reminders are a mercy for the soul.

text: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Seeing. (17:1)
loveLine: I see you, Orpi. Every bit of your brilliant, complex mind.
reflection: You are never invisible to the Creator.

text: And lower to them the wing of humility out of mercy. (17:24)
loveLine: Your heart is so soft beneath that cool exterior.
reflection: Humility is the crown of the wise.

text: Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured. (13:28)
loveLine: In a world of noise, you are my favorite kind of quiet.
reflection: Assurance comes from within.

text: The Most Merciful taught the Qur'an. (55:1-2)
loveLine: I love that you are a student of life, always seeking more.
reflection: Knowledge is the path to the Divine.

text: And Allah is with the patient. (2:153)
loveLine: Waiting for the right time with you is never a waste.
reflection: Patience is a beautiful adornment.

text: Sufficient for us is Allah, and [He is] the best Disposer of affairs. (3:173)
loveLine: I don't fear the future as long as I'm walking into it with you.
reflection: The best plan is His plan.

text: And He is over all things competent. (57:2)
loveLine: There is nothing too big for Him to solve for you.
reflection: Release the weight; it was never yours to carry.

text: Verily, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful. (12:98)
loveLine: Let's forgive each other's small flaws and focus on the love.
reflection: Forgiveness is the secret to a long life together.

text: He created the heavens and earth in truth. (39:5)
loveLine: You are the most beautiful truth I have ever known.
reflection: Reality is far more miraculous than fiction.

text: And tell My servants to say that which is best. (17:53)
loveLine: Your voice is the melody that calms my chaotic thoughts.
reflection: Words have the power to heal or hurt; choose healing.

text: Indeed, Allah is with those who fear Him and those who are doers of good. (16:128)
loveLine: I am proud of the person you are becoming every single day.
reflection: Integrity is doing the right thing when no one is looking.

text: And Allah invites to the Home of Peace. (10:25)
loveLine: May our home always be a sanctuary of laughter and light.
reflection: The ultimate home is where the heart finds rest.

text: And to your Lord direct [your] longing. (94:8)
loveLine: Even when I am with you, my soul longs for the One who gave you to me.
reflection: Ultimate love leads back to the Source.

text: Every soul shall taste death. (3:185)
loveLine: I want to love you in a way that lasts into the next life.
reflection: Live for the things that don't die.

text: And Allah would not punish them while they seek forgiveness. (8:33)
loveLine: We are both works in progress, and that is okay.
reflection: Seeking better is the first step to being better.

text: My success is not but through Allah. (11:88)
loveLine: I am cheering for your success more than my own.
reflection: Success is a gift, not just an achievement.

text: Indeed, your Lord is vast in forgiveness. (53:32)
loveLine: There is nothing you can do that would make me love you less.
reflection: Grace is the water that keeps love alive.

text: And give good tidings to the patient. (2:155)
loveLine: Good things take time, and you are the best of things.
reflection: The wait is part of the reward.

text: He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden. (20:7)
loveLine: I love the thoughts you haven't even shared with me yet.
reflection: You are fully known and fully loved.

text: And maintain the balance with justice. (55:9)
loveLine: You keep me balanced when I'm leaning too far into the work.
reflection: A balanced life is a blessed life.

text: Indeed, Allah is All-Knowing and All-Aware. (49:13)
loveLine: I'm glad our paths crossed in this massive, busy world.
reflection: Nothing is by chance.

text: And do not lose hope in the mercy of Allah. (39:53)
loveLine: When you lose hope in yourself, I will hold it for you.
reflection: Hope is the oxygen of the heart.

text: Allah is the Ally of those who believe. (2:257)
loveLine: You'll never have to face a single battle alone again.
reflection: You have the strongest Ally in existence.

text: And He gave you from all you asked of Him. (14:34)
loveLine: You are the blessing I forgot to ask for, but desperately needed.
reflection: Sometimes the best gifts are the ones we didn't expect.

text: Wealth and children are [but] adornment of the worldly life. (18:46)
loveLine: It's your character and soul that I treasure most.
reflection: Value the things that money cannot buy.
